RECOGNITION OF THE MALTA INSTITUTE OF
ACCOUNTANTS

[ L.S. 281.06

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 281.06
REGOLAMENTI DWAR RECOGNITION OF THE
MALTA INSTITUTE OF ACCOUNTANTS
1 ta’ Jannar, 2020
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 70 tal-2020.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
